ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, By-Election) */,
  "contest_status" TEXT /* Status of the contest (e.g., Contested, Uncontested) */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Assembly under which the election is held */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the election takes place */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_number" TEXT /* Number of the constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the constituency is located */,
  "geographical_description" TEXT /* Geographical description of the constituency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constituency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constituency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_stats" (
  "voter_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter statistics entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "voter_reg" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast */,
  "turnout" REAL /* Turnout rate as a percentage */,
  "votes_disq" INTEGER /* Number of disqualified votes */,
  "disq_pct" REAL /* Percentage of disqualified votes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the voter statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the voter statistics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_stats_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_stats_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_distribution" (
  "vote_dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote distribution entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "win_votes" INTEGER /* Votes received by the winning party */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "win_party" TEXT /* Name of the winning party */,
  "win_name" TEXT /* Name of the winning candidate */,
  "second_votes" INTEGER /* Votes received by the second party */,
  "second_pct" REAL /* Second party percentage */,
  "second_party" TEXT /* Name of the second party */,
  "second_name" TEXT /* Name of the second candidate */,
  "third_votes" INTEGER /* Votes received by the third party */,
  "third_pct" REAL /* Third party percentage */,
  "third_party" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "third_name" TEXT /* Name of the third candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote distribution record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_distribution_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_distribution_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_votes" (
  "additional_votes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for additional vote statistics */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  "remainder_votes" INTEGER /* Number of remainder votes */,
  "remainder_pct" REAL /* Remainder percentage */,
  "effective_parties" TEXT /* Description of effective parties involved in the election */,
  "Cox_SF_ratio" REAL /* Cox-SF ratio for the constituency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the additional votes record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the additional votes record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("additional_votes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_votes_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delimitation" (
  "delimitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delimitation record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election affected by the delimitation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delimitation changes */,
  "delimitation_date" TEXT /* Date of the delimitation */,
  "delimitation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delimitation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delimitation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delimitation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delimitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delimitation_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, observer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the party record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate represents */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate is contesting in */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Description of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official is involved in */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the election official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the official record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the official record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "polling_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling station */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the polling station is located in */,
  "polling_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "polling_station_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the polling station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the polling station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)
